name: consorcio-canalero
description: Sistema de gestion para Consorcio Canalero 10 de Mayo - Bell Ville

scripts.test:contract:backend: cd gee-backend && python3 -m pytest tests/test_reports_contract.py tests/test_tramites_schema.py tests/test_sugerencias_contract.py -q
scripts.test:smoke:frontend: cd consorcio-web && npm run test:run -- tests/unit/api.test.ts
scripts.quality:backend: cd gee-backend && ruff check . && mypy app/ --ignore-missing-imports && python3 -m pytest tests/test_reports_contract.py tests/test_tramites_schema.py tests/test_sugerencias_contract.py -q
scripts.quality:frontend: cd consorcio-web && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:run -- tests/unit/api.test.ts

author: Consorcio Canalero 10 de Mayo
